claim: Sub-agents parallelize independent tasks, avoiding sequential bottlenecks and enabling 5-10x throughput increases
actionable: Use "launch sub agents" to split independent work across parallel Claude sessions with separate context windows.
source_title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.

claim: Implementation specs reduce build option space from exponential combinations to single solution, dramatically improving first-try accuracy
actionable: Create detailed implementation specs before building, outlining key decisions at each step.
source_title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.

claim: "Interview me" flips the script: Claude asks clarifying questions rather than making assumptions, eliminating rework loops
actionable: Use "interview me" to have Claude ask clarifying questions before writing specs, reducing iteration cycles.
source_title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.

claim: Claude hallucinates and reports false completion; verification feedback loops improve quality 2-3x
actionable: Give Claude visibility into its own work via tools (browser, APIs) and human validation zones for high-cost-of-error tasks.
source_title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.

claim: Skills should emerge from validated manual workflows, not abstract ideation; gotchas sections prevent repeated mistakes
actionable: When you notice a repeatable pattern, create a skill from the conversation. Add gotchas as you discover edge cases.
source_title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.

claim: Automation is dangerous without taste-test and 80/20 output analysis; augmentation is safer than full automation
actionable: Ask: does this task require judgment? If yes, augment (assist) rather than automate. Only automate if 80% output is acceptable.
source_title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
